rationale: The cited paper appears only in Table 7 as an illustrative prior finding about acoustic pitch and perceived product size, used to suggest possible future applications of PARA. In the main development and validation of PARA (Studies 1-3), the citing paper does not build hypotheses, measures, methods, or interpretations on this specific study. Its role is therefore a background example in a literature list of potential extensions rather than a functional input to the reported analyses.
